$source: Phase 2 reuses Phase 1 tokens with minimal Monte Carlo-specific extensions
note: Phase 2 Monte Carlo stress test reuses ALL Phase 1 base tokens (color, typography, spacing, radii, shadow, border, transition, layout). The 4 probability threshold colors (green/blue/amber/red for success%) map directly to existing semantic tokens. Only new additions are segmented toggle UI tokens and canvas chart sizing.

probability.$comment: Maps success% thresholds to existing semantic colors (zero new hues)

high.description: Success% ≥85% — 'safe/great' tier. Reuses Phase 1 green (#10b981). WCAG AA on white (3.94:1).
high.$source: EXTENSION per intake B3 thresholds, maps to existing semantic.secondary

medium.description: Success% 75-84% — 'acceptable/OK' tier. Reuses Phase 1 primary blue (#2563eb). WCAG AAA on white (8.59:1).
medium.$source: EXTENSION per intake B3 thresholds, maps to existing brand.primary

borderline.description: Success% 50-74% — 'risky' tier. Reuses Phase 1 amber (#f59e0b). WCAG AA on white (3.48:1) for large text.
borderline.$source: EXTENSION per intake B3 thresholds, maps to existing semantic.warning

low.description: Success% <50% — 'likely fail' tier. Reuses Phase 1 red (#ef4444). WCAG AA on white (4.03:1).
low.$source: EXTENSION per intake B3 thresholds, maps to existing semantic.danger

toggle.$comment: New segmented control UI for 'Ideal Scenario | Stress Test (Monte Carlo)' toggle at top of Projections tab

container-bg.description: Toggle container background (light mode) — reuses #f8fafc slate-50

inactive-text.description: Inactive segment text — reuses #64748b slate-500 (WCAG AA 4.93:1 on white)

active-bg.description: Active segment background (light mode) — white with shadow for raised effect

active-text.description: Active segment text — reuses #1e293b slate-800 (WCAG AAA 12.63:1 on white)

toggle.$comment: Dark mode variants for segmented control

active-bg.description: Dark mode active segment background (slate-800, matches dark.panel-bg)

toggle-padding.description: Padding inside toggle container around segment buttons

toggle-active.description: Subtle shadow on active toggle segment (raised appearance, iOS-style)

chart-canvas.$comment: Canvas dimensions for Monte Carlo charts (bar chart + line chart with confidence bands)

bar-height.description: Success% by age bar chart height (desktop)

bar-height-mobile.description: Success% by age bar chart height (mobile <768px)

bar-width.description: Individual age-bar width in success% chart (desktop)
bar-width.$source: EXTENSION — Monte Carlo bar chart sizing

bar-width-mobile.description: Individual age-bar width in success% chart (mobile)
bar-width-mobile.$source: EXTENSION — Monte Carlo bar chart sizing

bar-gap.description: Gap between age bars in success% chart
